entity.label: Migron
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Precipice or landslip, a place between Aiath and Michmash (Isa. 10:28). The town of the same name mentioned in 1 Sam. 14:2 was to the south of this.

nodes.label: Migron
nodes.description: Precipice or landslip, a place between Aiath and Michmash (Isa. 10:28). The town of the same name mentioned in 1 Sam. 14:2 was to the south of this.

verses.text: And Saul tarried in the uttermost part of Gibeah under a pomegranate tree which is in Migron: and the people that were with him were about six hundred men;
He is come to Aiath, he is passed to Migron; at Michmash he hath laid up his carriages:
